dialogos.texto_en: (Nino took me to the American Village,\n saying she wanted to be alone with me.)
(Originally, we were planning to come here\n after sightseeing in Kokusai dori,\n but we ended up coming here alone first.)
(I think this place is a shopping mall\n that was designed to resemble\n the West Coast of America.)
(Indeed, the colorful buildings and flashy displays\n give off an atmosphere that doesn't feel like Japan.)
(Normally, this is the kind of place\n where Nino would get really excited\n and happily check out all the shops, but%p-2;――%p;)
Hey, Nino.\nWhy the sudden desire to be alone with me?\nYou don't...wanna go shopping, right?
I told you, I have something to talk to you about.\nAnd besides%p-2;――
Isn't there something you want to ask me\nor say to me, Futaro?
How did you know?\nI haven't said anything yet.
I just know.\nAfter all, I AM your girlfriend, right?\nDon't underestimate me.
Shall we go on the Ferris wheel then?
Huh? The Ferris wheel?\nThe one over there?
We can talk there without anyone overhearing us.\nIt'll be easier for us to talk there, won't it?
